penalties.description: Task not completed - objects remain on the right side and have not been transferred back to the original left side.

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Major disagreement on task completion. Claude identified incomplete task with objects remaining on right side, while GPT-4o claimed full completion. Given that Claude provided specific details about incomplete return transfers and GPT-4o's completion time of 82.3 seconds seems implausibly fast for full peg transfer completion, Claude's assessment of incomplete task is more credible. Incomplete tasks receive zero score per FLS rules.
